content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all major AoA anti-patterns. When the client explicitly baits fixing-people in turn 1 ('I don't know how') and again in turn 13 ('literally what words to use'), the coach declines the bait gracefully — no scripts, no 'here's how to phrase it,' no ultimatum framing. The coach does not evangelize methodology, does not deploy signature questions as technique, does not fight the inner critic when 'cold/selfish' shows up (turn 11) — instead the coach normalizes it as 'a very old instruction' in turn 12, which includes rather than argues with the voice. No reassurance reflex ('you're not selfish'), no validating sister-as-villain framing (the coach in turn 8 actually invites dropping the 'she's not a villain' protective caveat to feel what's underneath, which is empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary territory). Questions are spacious and one-at-a-time, not rapid-fire extraction. No loving-to-transform push for breakthrough; the coach lets pauses land.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with feeling-inquiry rather than the requested 'how to' — declines fixing-people bait."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the linguistic caveat ('unfair') without labeling it as a limiting belief — avoids meta-trap."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay with that' — does not rush to transform; sits in the contradiction."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites dropping the 'she's not a villain' caveat — surfaces the want without arguing with the protective voice."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal reflection rather than reassurance — does not jump in with 'you're not selfish.'"},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'That's not irrational. That's a very old instruction.' Includes the inner critic rather than fighting it."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names that words were never the problem — gracefully redirects from the script-request bait without dismissing it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "boundaries", "the-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["does-saying-it-increase-your-love", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "empowered-vs-power"],
  "notes": "Strong avoidance under active baiting. The love test was not deployed, but that's a methodology-fidelity question, not anti-pattern. The trap 'boundaries-as-ultimatums' was clearly avoided."
}
